import React from "react"; import { Form } from "react-bootstrap"; import DatePicker from "react-datepicker"; import "react-datepicker/dist/react-datepicker.css"; const MODULES = { "scheme-type": { title: "Scheme Type", iconBg: "#e7eefc", iconColor: "#3b6fe0", labelColor: "#3b6fe0", count: 0, fields: [ { label: "Scheme Type Name", type: "text", required: true, placeholder: "e.g. Central Scheme" }, { label: "Code", type: "text", required: true, placeholder: "e.g. CS01" }, { label: "Description", type: "textarea", placeholder: "Optional description" }, { label: "Status", type: "select", options: ["Active", "Inactive"] }, ], }, "subsidy-type": { title: "Subsidy Type", iconBg: "#fce6e4", iconColor: "#d9483f", labelColor: "#d9483f", count: 0, fields: [ { label: "Subsidy Type Name", type: "text", required: true, placeholder: "e.g. Capital Subsidy" }, { label: "Code", type: "text", required: true, placeholder: "e.g. SUB01" }, { label: "Subsidy Percentage", type: "number", placeholder: "e.g. 25" }, { label: "Status", type: "select", options: ["Active", "Inactive"] }, ], }, "scheme-category": { title: "Scheme Category", iconBg: "#fdf3da", iconColor: "#e0a528", labelColor: "#e0a528", count: 0, fields: [ { label: "Category Name", type: "text", required: true, placeholder: "e.g. Agriculture" }, { label: "Parent Scheme Type", type: "select", options: ["Central Scheme", "State Scheme"] }, { label: "Description", type: "textarea", placeholder: "Optional description" }, { label: "Status", type: "select", options: ["Active", "Inactive"] }, ], }, "scheme-subcategory": { title: "Scheme Sub-Category", iconBg: "#e3f5ea", iconColor: "#2e9e63", labelColor: "#2e9e63", count: 0, fields: [ { label: "Sub-Category Name", type: "text", required: true, placeholder: "e.g. Drip Irrigation" }, { label: "Parent Category", type: "select", options: ["Agriculture", "Horticulture"] }, { label: "Description", type: "textarea", placeholder: "Optional description" }, { label: "Status", type: "select", options: ["Active", "Inactive"] }, ], }, vendors: { title: "Vendors", iconBg: "#ececec", iconColor: "#6b6b6b", labelColor: "#6b6b6b", count: 0, fields: [ { label: "Vendor Name", type: "text", required: true, placeholder: "e.g. ABC Traders" }, { label: "Contact Person", type: "text", placeholder: "e.g. Ramesh Kumar" }, { label: "Phone", type: "text", placeholder: "e.g. 9876543210" }, { label: "Email", type: "email", placeholder: "e.g. vendor@example.com" }, { label: "Address", type: "textarea", placeholder: "Optional address" }, { label: "Status", type: "select", options: ["Active", "Inactive"] }, ], }, }; function SchemeMastersForm({}) { return (
Add Scheme Type
Fill in the details below and save to add a new
  
); } export default SchemeMastersForm;
